problem id: 343095d3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01100111 -> 10001110
  11011100 -> 00111001
  01101111 -> 00001110
  10010010 -> 00000101
  00101101 -> 00001010
  01001001 -> 00000010
  01000110 -> 10001100
  00000001 -> 00000010
  10101100 -> 00011001
  01100011 -> 11000110

query: 01111010
predicted answer: 01010100
